reason: Runtime launch command routing, provider selection, proxy wiring, and session/runtime entry planning remain capped after wiring the provider-aware gateway configuration boundary.
App-server diagnostic, schema-validation, replay, and stdio preview handling remain capped while the protocol-aware broker is split into focused transport and validation modules.
The local control-plane HTTP server, redacted JSON endpoints, provider/model catalog assembly, and dashboard tests remain capped while endpoint handlers are split from server orchestration.
Login flow TUI prompts, provider handling, and persisted profile setup remain capped while provider-specific flow ownership is extracted.
Copilot profile import, direct runtime API auth, model catalog refresh, legacy token fallback, and bounded HTTP response reads remain capped while auth refresh is split from profile import ownership.
Kiro profile import now includes stricter private temp-home handling for copied credentials; capped at current size until provider import helpers are split from command orchestration.
Live quota snapshot retention, terminal sizing, adaptive refresh policy, and fetch orchestration remain capped after native TUI rendering helpers moved to a sibling module.

Local rewrite and gateway request orchestration now performs header-first admin and virtual-key authentication, tenant conversation scoping, and bounded background-task admission; capped until request admission is split from proxy startup.
Kiro local rewrite request/response translation remains capped while request parsing and protocol mapping are split; includes bounded streaming delivery and tenant-scoped conversation persistence.
Local rewrite cross-provider regression coverage remains capped while provider-specific cases are split from shared harness coverage.
DeepSeek request rewrite regression coverage remains capped while compatibility cases are split by feature family.

Gateway usage regressions now cover atomic budget admission, header-first virtual-key rejection, bounded persistence queues, and request-id cleanup; capped until admission and persistence fixtures are split.
Provider bridge regression coverage includes translated compact routing, provider conformance outcomes, gateway accounting, and continuation metadata parity; capped until tests split by provider.

Provider-aware runtime and gateway argument parsing, trailing-var-arg extraction, struct definitions, and compatibility tests remain a tightly coupled CLI surface.

Session report resolution, resume repair with slim threshold change; recapped at current size.
